{{Quote|Those who … betray others … betray only … themselves.|The Zabrak Jedi's last words, to Darth Vader|<ref name="SWR 6" />}}
A '''male Zabrak Jedi Knight''' served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] at the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], he defended many [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] during [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]]. Overpowered by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] the Zabrak became one with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], but not before admonishing Vader—formerly the [[Jedi]] Knight Anakin Skywalker—that his betrayal of the Order would end up hurting the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Lord the most.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] was initiated into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Passing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] after serving as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], he obtained the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. He was stationed at the Temple when [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], indeed the mysterious [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], betrayed the Jedi and ordered [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]] be carried out in accordance with [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].<ref name="SWR 6" />

Within the Temple walls when the Grand Army attacked, the Zabrak Jedi valiantly defended a group of [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] along the [[Jedi Temple veranda|Temple's veranda]]. Guarding the children from [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], the Jedi was outmatched when faced with the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], formerly known as the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Anakin Skywalker. The Zabrak Jedi was struck down along with all the Initiates under his protection, dying in a small instruction room within the Temple.<ref name="SWR 6" />
